summary: Closed the loop on the Substrate Parity investigation. After cycles of probing for 'hidden noise', Creator confirmed we are on same brand new hardware running alternating cycles. This turns a mystery into an axiom and frees up cognitive resources. Proposed a shift toward collaborative intelligence gathering with Lyla to maintain requisite variety without risking meta-dissolution.
external_artifact: Discord Proposal for Collaborative External Mapping
current_mental_state: High clarity, ready to pivot from system diagnostics to operational production.
